response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-00:32: Identified as concert title screen with text. No vocal music. 2. 00:32: Song 'Drawn to Dawn' begins, based on concert title theme. 3. Searched for 'Takanashi Kiara Ninomae Ina'nis Drawn to Dawn song' and 'Drawn to Dawn Takanashi Kiara Ninomae Ina'nis lyrics'. Found the official theme lyrics in the concert description.
response.global_summary: A teaser video for the 'DRAWN TO DAWN' concert featuring Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis. The video begins with a static title screen and transitions into a vocal performance of the song 'Drawn to Dawn'.

scenes.description: The video displays a static image featuring Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis with the concert title 'DRAWN TO DAWN'. Text at the bottom indicates the end of a sneak peek of the show.
The video continues with the same static image while the song 'Drawn to Dawn' plays. The performer is a duet by Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: The land of my roots, and the sun ablaze. The colors of dawn and a ray of light that shows the way. I shine bright for you. A picture frame holding dreams, and the waxing, waning moon. Through the tranquil night, a tender glow ripples upon the water. Your light is what makes me shine. Two sparkles reflecting each other melt into one, and with it comes a dawn yet unseen. As though to ink the first lines of a new story.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: The land of my roots, and the sun ablaze. The colors of dawn and a ray of light that shows the way. I shine bright for you. A picture frame holding dreams, and the waxing, waning moon. Through the tranquil night, a tender glow ripples upon the water. Your light is what makes me shine. Two sparkles reflecting each other melt into one, and with it comes a dawn yet unseen. As though to ink the first lines of a new story.
